6.script:
on mouseUp pButtonNumber
   send "mouseUp" to btn "empty"
   
   --   put the properties of button 1 into myArray
   --   put myArray["id"]
   
   
   
   put the properties of btn "number of controls" into myArray
   combine myArray using return and ": "
   put myArray into fld "fldNumberOfControls"
end mouseUp

4.script:
on mouseUp
   --•• get the number of all fields of the current card
   put the number of flds into tNumberOfAllFields
   
   --•• if field is selectable then clear it
   repeat with I = 1 to tNumberOfAllFields
      if not the cantSelect of fld I then put empty into fld I
   end repeat
   
end mouseUp

21.script:

   local tGroup
   put the long id of the owner of me into tGroup
   
   hide me
   show image "image2" of group id (the id of the owner of me)

end mouseUp

3.script:

   repeat with I = 1 to the number of controls of this stack
      put the short name of control I of this stack & return after fld "fldNumberOfControls"
   end repeat
   
end mouseUp

9.script:
on mouseUp pButtonNumber
   send "mouseUp" to btn "empty"
   --   put the properties of button 1 into myArray
   --   put myArray["id"]
   
   repeat with I = 1 to the number of controls of this stack
      put the name of control I of this stack & return after fld "fldNumberOfControls"
      put the properties of control I of this stack into myArray
      combine myArray using return and ": "
      put removeHTML(myArray) & return & return & return & return after fld "fldNumberOfControls"
   end repeat
   
   
end mouseUp

function removeHTML pString
   return replaceText(pString,"<[^<]+>",empty)
   --return pString
end removeHTML

14.script:
on mouseUp
   -- This tells the knob to act as if it were clicked
   send "mouseUp" to img "imgKnob" of the owner of me
end mouseUp
14.longName: image "imgBase" of group "grpSlider" of card id 1002 of stack "/Users/rkoche/Documents/Rolf's HyperXTalk Scripts/ Rolf's macOS Stuff/Kochi Stack Export to Text/Test_0.0.hyperxtalk"

15.script:
on mouseUp
   local tPadding
   put -3 into tPadding
   
   local tLeftPos, tRightPos
   put (left of img "imgBase" of the owner of me + (width of img "imgKnob" of the owner of me / 2) + tPadding) into tLeftPos
   put (right of img "imgBase" of the owner of me - (width of img "imgKnob" of the owner of me / 2) - tPadding) into tRightPos
   
   -- We add 1 to the vertical position (item 2) to nudge it down
   local tVerticalCenter
   put (item 2 of the loc of img "imgBase" of the owner of me) + 2 into tVerticalCenter
   
   if item 1 of the loc of img "imgKnob" of the owner of me < (item 1 of the loc of img "imgBase" of the owner of me) then
      move img "imgKnob" of the owner of me to tRightPos, tVerticalCenter in 10 ticks
      set the uSwitchState of the owner of me to "true"
   else
      move img "imgKnob" of the owner of me to tLeftPos, tVerticalCenter in 10 ticks
      set the uSwitchState of the owner of me to "false"
   end if
end mouseUp
15.longName: image "imgKnob" of group "grpSlider" of card id 1002 of stack "/Users/rkoche/Documents/Rolf's HyperXTalk Scripts/ Rolf's macOS Stuff/Kochi Stack Export to Text/Test_0.0.hyperxtalk"

11.script:
on mouseUp
   lock screen

   put the loc of me into varButtonTextBlackPosition
   add 3 to item 2 of varButtonTextBlackPosition
   set the loc of me to varButtonTextBlackPosition

   unlock screen

end mouseUp

on mouseDown
   lock screen

   put the loc of me into varButtonTextBlackPosition
   subtract 3 from item 2 of varButtonTextBlackPosition
   set the loc of me to varButtonTextBlackPosition

   unlock screen
end mouseDown
11.longName: image "imgRoundUp" of card id 1002 of stack "/Users/rkoche/Documents/Rolf's HyperXTalk Scripts/ Rolf's macOS Stuff/Kochi Stack Export to Text/Test_0.0.hyperxtalk"

12.script:
on mouseUp
   set the margins of me to 0,-2,0,0
   put "linear" into tGradientProperties["type"]
   put "0.00000," & "94,94,94" & return  & "1.00000," & "66,66,66" into tGradientProperties["ramp"]
   set the fillGradient of me to tGradientProperties
end mouseUp

on mouseEnter
  put "94,94,94" into tTopColorEnter;add 10 to item 1 of tTopColorEnter;add 10 to item 2 of tTopColorEnter;add 10 to item 3 of tTopColorEnter
  put "66,66,66" into tBottomColorEnter;add 10 to item 1 of tBottomColorEnter;add 10 to item 2 of tBottomColorEnter;add 10 to item 3 of tBottomColorEnter
  put "linear" into tGradientProperties["type"]
  put "0.00000," & tTopColorEnter & return  & "1.00000," & tBottomColorEnter into tGradientProperties["ramp"]
  set the fillGradient of me to tGradientProperties
end mouseEnter

on mouseDown
  set the margins of me to 0,-1,0,0
  put "94,94,94" into tTopColorDown;subtract 10 from item 1 of tTopColorDown;subtract 10 from item 2 of tTopColorDown;subtract 10 from item 3 of tTopColorDown
  put "66,66,66" into tBottomColorDown;subtract 10 from item 1 of tBottomColorDown;subtract 10 from item 2 of tBottomColorDown;subtract 10 from item 3 of tBottomColorDown
  put "linear" into tGradientProperties["type"]
  put "0.00000," & tTopColorDown & return  & "1.00000," & tBottomColorDown into tGradientProperties["ramp"]
  set the fillGradient of me to tGradientProperties
end mouseDown

on mouseLeave
  put "linear" into tGradientProperties["type"]
  put "0.00000," & "94,94,94" & return  & "1.00000," & "66,66,66" into tGradientProperties["ramp"]
  set the fillGradient of me to tGradientProperties
end mouseLeave
